mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM user_agent_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_agent_session (user_id, title, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_agent_session SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE user_agent_session SET title = #{title}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
